description_long: This is a brown glass beer bottle with a long neck and a black crown cap. The front of the bottle features a prominent light blue label with bold black and white text, giving it a modern and eye-catching appearance. The label wraps partially around the bottle, with the back and sides left unadorned, showing the smooth, dark brown glass. The bottle is slender and cylindrical, tapering slightly at the neck, and appears to be of standard size for a single serving of beer. The surface is matte with no visible condensation or gloss, and the cap is securely attached. The overall design is simple yet striking, with the label providing the main visual interest.
description: A brown glass beer bottle with a long neck, black crown cap, and a bold light blue label with black and white text. The label stands out against the otherwise plain, matte brown glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full light blue label with bold black and white text, and the black crown cap on top.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the edge of the label and the mostly unadorned brown glass body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown glass surface with no label or markings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other edge of the label and the smooth brown glass.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, modern design with a light blue background, large black and white sans-serif text, and minimal decorative elements. The style is clean and contemporary, focusing on high contrast and readability.
